case_title: CARB, GREGG J., DC VS MASON, SYDNEY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,170.00 FILED BY CARB, GREGG J., DC AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, SYDNEY GRITZ, ERICK, ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED AS TO DEFT. MASON. DEFT. GRITZ, ERICK IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-05-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-27-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CON'T REQUEST ORDERED BY COURT REMAILED TO BOTH PLFT AND DEFT.
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT GRITZ, ERICK, ESQ.
REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE BY DEFENDANT DENIED.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ERICK GRITZ, ESQ.
DEFT.FILING FOR ORDERED CONTINUANCE FOR 9/5/00 AT 10AM,IFP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARB, GREGG J., DC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASON, SYDNEY $3,170.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,190.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT. SYDNEY MASON'S CONT.REQ.RCVD. SENT INFO RE: REQ.AND FEES;
CORRESPONDENCE FROM GREGG J CARB FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-22-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-05-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT SYDNEY MASON FILED FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED 9/27/00 AT 10:00 AM. IFP.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SYDNEY MASON RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE FILED;
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-13-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-22-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
